content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-13 01:52 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status. [Subagent Task]: ## Task: Fix QLHV Auth UI — Login + Register Forms **Project:** AHV QLHV Frontend **Workspace:** /root/.openclaw/workspaces/teacher-driving-training-system.bootstrap-backup/ahv-qlhv-fe --- ### Bugs Found **Bug #1 — Login form misleading UX:** File: `src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` - Field "Tên đăng nhập" uses `Mail` icon (from lucide-react) which is misleading — users might think they should enter their email - Fix: Change icon to `User` (already imported from lucide-react) and update placeholder text to clearly say "Nhập tên đăng nhập" **Bug #2 — Register form missing fields:** File: `src/app/(auth)/register/page.tsx` - Frontend sends only: `username, password, first_name, last_name, email, phone` - Backend model requires `address` and `identity_card` as required fields - Fix: Add two optional input fields for `address` and `identity_card` so users can fill them during registration, OR update the form to send default values **Note:** The backend fix (by senior-backend agent) will also provide defaults server-side. You can choose EITHER: - (A) Add address + identity_card fields to the register form UI (better UX — user provides real data) - (B) Just fix Bug #1 (login icon) and rely on backend defaults Recommendation: Option A is better UX. Add both fields with appropriate icons. --- ### Fix #1: Login Page Icon Fix In `src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`: - Change `import { Mail, Lock, ChevronRight, User, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';` → keep `Mail` if needed for email field - For the "Tên đăng nhập" input, use `User` icon instead of `Mail` - Change placeholder from `placeholder="admin"` to `placeholder="Nhập tên đăng nhập"` --- ### Fix #2: Register Page — Add Missing Fields In `src/app/(auth)/register/page.tsx`, after the Email field (before Password field), add: ```tsx // Address field
setAddress(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl font-medium outline-none focus:border-primary/20 focus:bg-white transition-all text-gray-900" />
// Identity Card field
setIdentityCard(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl font-medium outline-none focus:border-primary/20 focus:bg-white transition-all text-gray-900" />
``` Add state: `const [address, setAddress] = useState(''); const [identityCard, setIdentityCard] = useState('');` Update `handleSubmit` payload to include: ```typescript address, identity_card: identityCard, ``` Import icons: `MapPin, FileText` from lucide-react --- ### Execution Steps 1. Read current `login/page.tsx` and `register/page.tsx` 2. Apply Fix #1 (login icon) 3. Apply Fix #2 (register fields) 4. Run `yarn lint` to verify 5. Commit with message: `fix(auth-ui): correct login icon and add address/identity_card fields to register form` ### WORKING DIRECTORY `/root/.openclaw/workspaces/teacher-driving-training-system.bootstrap-backup/ahv-qlhv-fe`
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.
